description: Upgrade plan to migrate Java project to latest LTS versions

tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to version 21 (latest LTS). Update build configuration files (pom.xml or build.gradle) to target Java 21. Ensure all dependencies are compatible with Java 21.
tasks.taskSummary: Upgraded Java from 8 to 21 LTS. Updated pom.xml compiler source/target to 21, upgraded Spring Boot to 3.3.5, updated ojdbc8 to ojdbc11, migrated javax.persistence/validation to jakarta.* namespace, updated Dockerfile to eclipse-temurin:21. Build and unit tests pass.

tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4 (latest stable). Upgrade Spring Framework to 6.x. Migrate javax.* packages to jakarta.* namespace. Update all Spring Boot starter dependencies to 3.4. Address any breaking changes in Spring Boot 3.x migration.
tasks.taskSummary: Upgraded Spring Boot from 3.3.5 to 3.4.7 (latest stable). Spring Framework 6.x and Jakarta namespace migration were already in place from task 001. Build and unit tests pass.

tasks.description: Upgrade project dependencies to latest compatible versions
tasks.requirements: Update all third-party dependencies to their latest versions compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4. Resolve any dependency conflicts. Ensure all dependencies are compatible with jakarta.* namespace.
tasks.taskSummary: Updated commons-io from 2.11.0 to 2.18.0 (resolves CVE-2021-29425). All other dependencies managed by Spring Boot 3.4.7 BOM are already at latest compatible versions. Build and unit tests pass, security compliance satisfied.
